title: Algorithm to Check 2NF
description: Procedure to determine if a relation is in Second Normal Form
code:
PROCEDURE Check2NF(Relation R, Set FDs, Set CandidateKeys)
BEGIN
 // Step 1: Check if in 1NF
 IF NOT IsIn1NF(R) THEN
 RETURN "Not in 1NF"
 END IF
 
 // Step 2: Check for partial dependencies
 FOR EACH FD X → Y IN FDs DO
 IF X is a proper subset of any CandidateKey THEN
 // Partial dependency exists
 IF Y contains non-prime attribute THEN
 RETURN "Violates 2NF: Partial dependency " + X + " → " + Y
 END IF
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 RETURN "In 2NF"
END
explanation: The algorithm checks if any non-prime attribute is functionally dependent on part of any candidate key, which would violate 2NF.

title: Algorithm to Check 3NF
description: Procedure to determine if a relation is in Third Normal Form
code:
PROCEDURE Check3NF(Relation R, Set FDs)
BEGIN
 // First check if in 2NF
 IF NOT IsIn2NF(R) THEN
 RETURN "Not in 2NF, hence not in 3NF"
 END IF
 
 // Step 2: Check for transitive dependencies
 FOR EACH FD X → Y IN FDs DO
 // Check if X is non-prime and Y is non-prime
 IF X is NOT a superkey AND Y contains non-prime attribute THEN
 // Possible transitive dependency
 // Check if there exists Z where X→Z and Z→Y
 FOR EACH FD Z → W IN FDs DO
 IF X contains Z AND W contains attribute in Y THEN
 RETURN "Violates 3NF: Transitive dependency through " + Z
 END IF
 END FOR
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 RETURN "In 3NF"
END
explanation: This checks for transitive dependencies where a non-prime attribute determines another non-prime attribute through an intermediary.

title: Decomposition to 3NF
description: Algorithm to decompose a relation into Third Normal Form
explanation: This algorithm decomposes a relation into 3NF by using the minimal cover of functional dependencies and ensuring the candidate key is preserved.

title: Find Minimal Cover
description: Algorithm to find minimal cover of functional dependencies
explanation: The minimal cover simplifies FDs by splitting RHS, removing extraneous LHS attributes, and removing redundant dependencies.
